task: TASK 3 (supersession #2, THEME CONTROL ONLY): replace ThemeDropdown with a tri-state icon CYCLE BUTTON — press cycles light → dark → system; icon swaps per mode; 'system' follows the OS preference (matchMedia) LIVE. Language, country, currency dropdowns unchanged. All task-2 cross-cutting requirements remain binding: icon-only control, nothing decorative, 100% mobile-first, i18n en+es.
supersession: User 2026-07-09 (verbatim): 'Dark mode cannot be a dropdown menu because that would confuse or annoy the user; it's better if it's a button that changes as it's pressed. It will have three modes that swap the icon: light mode, dark mode, and system (which will use the one the user has for their system).' Supersedes CONTRACTS §7.2 (ThemeDropdown) for the theme control ONLY.

harnessNotes.e2e_install: cd e2e && pnpm install --ignore-workspace (root pnpm-workspace.yaml has no packages: field)
harnessNotes.jest_coverage: use pnpm exec jest --coverage (pnpm test -- --coverage passes --coverage as a test pattern)
harnessNotes.e2e_stale_server: ALWAYS kill anything on :4173 before e2e (lsof -ti:4173 | xargs kill -9)
harnessNotes.no_destructive_git: NEVER git clean/stash/reset/checkout-- — uncommitted signed-off work lives in the tree until the user commits
harnessNotes.formatter_hook: PostToolUse hook reformats after Write/Edit — normal
harnessNotes.playwright_output: RTK proxy truncates/swallows playwright stdout AND redirects — wrap in sh -c '... > file' and read the file, or rely on exit code
